Treatments

All Dental Treatments

Implants
Dental Implants

Permanent, natural-looking tooth replacement using titanium implants. Computer-guided placement with CBCT 3D imaging. ₹25,000–₹60,000

Learn more →
Root Canal
Painless Root Canal (RCT)

Advanced rotary RCT to save infected teeth. Virtually painless with digital X-rays confirming accuracy. ₹3,000–₹8,000

Learn more →
Cosmetic
Laser Teeth Whitening

4–8 shades lighter in a single session. Professional laser whitening for immediate, dramatic results. ₹8,000–₹15,000

Learn more →
Smile Design
Smile Design & Veneers

Complete smile makeovers — veneers, bonding, contouring. Digital preview before treatment begins.

Book consultation →
Restorative
Dental Bridges & Crowns

Fixed, permanent solutions for missing or damaged teeth. Natural-looking ceramic crowns and bridges.

Book consultation →
Restorative
Tooth Fillings

Tooth-coloured composite fillings that are completely invisible. Early cavity treatment saves you from complex procedures.

Learn more →

More treatments

Also Available At Our Clinic

⚡ Laser Dentistry

Minimally invasive laser treatments for gum disease, cavities and whitening. Faster healing, no stitches.

📐 Orthodontics

Traditional braces (₹25,000–₹45,000) and clear aligners (₹60,000–₹1,50,000) for all ages.

🛡 Preventive Care

Professional cleanings, X-rays, fluoride and sealants every 6 months to keep your teeth healthy.

🔍 Oral Cancer Screening

Early detection of oral cancer and precancerous lesions. Available at every routine checkup — free of charge.
